desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Performs up to four attacks forward, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: During the 4th hit, press <IconSpecial /> to use <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct>, reducing HP consumption by 50%.
desc.3: Restores a small amount of HP on hit.

desc.0: With enough <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct>, hold <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Charges forward on the motorcycle, then fires a laser beam, dealing massive <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconEvade /> to activate:
desc.1: A quick dash dodge.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: During <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct>, drag the {LAYOUT_CONSOLECONTROLLER#stick}{LAYOUT_FALLBACK#joystick} or hold <IconEvade /> to activate:
desc.1: Drifts with the motorcycle, enabling <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodges</ct> for a brief duration.
desc.2: If a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> is successfully triggered, it immediately chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter: Afterfire Spin</ct>.
desc.3: During this skill, continue dragging the {LAYOUT_CONSOLECONTROLLER#stick}{LAYOUT_FALLBACK#joystick} or holding <IconEvade /> to continue drifting.
desc.4: During this skill, the duration of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct> will continue, and upon reaching the maximum duration, it automatically chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>.
desc.5: If the skill ends early, it automatically chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Run Wild</ct>.
desc.6: Character is briefly invulnerable and Anti-Interrupt Level increases during this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a dodge to activate:
desc.1: Performs a quick forward slash, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Fires a blast from his arm cannon, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: If this skill is triggered via a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct>, hitting an enemy restores 10% of Max HP, and it can be chained into the 4th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Knight's Technique</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: During <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge: Through the Galaxy</ct>, trigger a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Spins with the bike to deal <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct> to surrounding enemies.
desc.2: After using this skill, it automatically chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When HP is above 25%, press <IconSpecial /> to activate:
desc.1: Consumes HP equal to 16% of Max HP to summon a motorcycle and swiftly crash into enemies, continuously dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: If attacked by an enemy as the active character shortly upon activating this skill, triggers a block, negating the attack and restoring 5 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct>.
desc.3: After triggering a block, immediately chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>.
desc.4: After the skill continues for a while, it automatically chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>.
desc.5: Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

desc.0: Triggers automatically when <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge: Through the Galaxy</ct> is interrupted:
desc.1: Kicks his motorcycle at enemies, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After using this skill, it can be chained into <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter: Duel King</ct>.
desc.3: Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

desc.0: Triggers automatically when <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct> reaches its maximum duration or a block is triggered:
desc.1: Lifts the motorcycle to attack enemies, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: On hit, restores an additional 8 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct>.
desc.3: After using this skill, with enough Adrenaline, press or hold <IconSpecialReadyRp /> to chain into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Rocking Footwork</ct>.
desc.4: After the skill animation ends, automatically chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Run Wild</ct>.
desc.5: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: With enough Adrenaline, hold <IconSpecialReadyRp /> to activate:
desc.1: Slams down with the motorcycle, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Restores 30% of Max HP upon activating this skill.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: After activating <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct> and with enough Adrenaline, press or hold <IconSpecialReadyRp /> to activate:
desc.1: Uses the motorcycle and hand cannon for a combined attack, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Upon activating this skill, restore 15% of Max HP.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> is triggered, select the character to activate:
desc.1: Launches a series of attacks forward, dealing massive <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Upon activating this skill, gains 15 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When Decibel Rating is at <ct color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</ct>, press <IconUltimateReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Leaps into the air and delivers a flying kick at the target, dealing massive <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

QuickAssistStarlightPowerOfBonds.name: Quick Assist: Starlight - Power of Bonds

desc.0: When the active character is launched, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Fires a blast from his arm cannon ahead, dealing <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>. When HP is above 25%, this skill is replaced with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 5s.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> after a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Kicks the motorcycle at the target, dealing massive <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Starlight - Billy gains extra Sheer Force based on his Max HP, with every 1 point of Max HP increasing Sheer Force by 0.1. All <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct> Starlight - Billy deals is Sheer DMG, ignoring enemy DEF and using his Sheer Force stat as the DMG Multiplier.
desc.1: Starlight - Billy restores 60 Adrenaline upon entering the battlefield. In Investigation Zone Mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s.
desc.2: When his HP is greater than 25%, press <IconSpecial /> to consume HP and activate <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct>. While in combat, each use of this skill increases his CRIT DMG by <ct color=#2BAD00>45%</ct> for 45s. Repeated triggers refresh the duration. When HP is at or below 25%, the DMG he takes is reduced by 50%.
desc.3: Starlight - Billy gains <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct> when his attacks hit enemies, with the amount depending on the skill used. <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct> regenerates slowly while in combat, and is capped at 120. Hitting an enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>, activating <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack: Knight's Swagger</ct>, or triggering a block restores additional <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct>. Triggering a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> by any means restores 3 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 0.5s.
desc.4: When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct> is greater than or equal to 100, hold <IconNormal /> to consume 100 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Determination</ct> and activate <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Full-Throttle Starlight</ct>.
desc.5: Hitting an enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Knight's Technique</ct> restores a small amount of HP. Hitting an enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter: Duel King</ct> activated through a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> restores HP. Using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: High-Traction Wheels</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Rocking Footwork</ct> restores HP.

desc.0: Starlight - Billy gains extra Sheer Force based on his Max HP, with every 1 point of Max HP increasing Sheer Force by 0.1. All <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct> Starlight - Billy deals is Sheer DMG, ignoring enemy DEF and using his Sheer Force stat as the DMG Multiplier.

Using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: High-Traction Wheels</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Rocking Footwork</ct> restores HP.

desc.0: When another character in your squad is a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Stun</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Defense</ct>, or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Support</ct> character:
desc.1: Hitting an enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>, the 4th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Knight's Technique</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct>, or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> grants 1 stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Starlight</ct> for 45s, up to a maximum of 2 stacks, Only one stack can be obtained per use of a skill. Each stack increases the DMG of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attacks</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimates</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attacks</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Full-Throttle Starlight</ct> by 20%.

1.name: Heroic Entrance
1.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Core Passive: Knight's Resolve</ct> restores an additional 60 Adrenaline upon entering the battlefield. Hitting an enemy with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> causes Starlight - Billy's DMG to ignore 18% <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical RES</ct> for 45s. Repeated triggers refresh the duration.

flavor.0: There are just as many bad guys in New Eridu as in a visual FX show, but there aren't many real heroes.
flavor.1: "I might be good at shouting heroic lines, but I can't really call myself a hero yet..."
flavor.2: "But I'll follow their example and stand up front to protect everyone!"

2.name: Wasteland Automaton
2.desc: Increases the DMG dealt by <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Full-Throttle Starlight</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Starlight Knight Flying Kick</ct> by 50%. Activating <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Rocking Footwork</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: High-Traction Wheels</ct>, or hitting a Stunned enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct> grants the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Turbocharged</ct> effect: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct> consumes this effect to immediately follow up with <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>, and increases that instance's CRIT DMG by 50%. Only 1 stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Turbocharged</ct> can be held.

flavor.0: There's no shortage of sharpshooters in the Outer Ring, but keeping perfect aim on a speeding bike is what defines a real ace.
flavor.1: "Ballistic calculations and mechanical fingers? Of course they help..."
flavor.2: "But the real reason I'm dead-on every time is because... the Starlight chose me!"

3.name: Knight's Chivalry
3.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

flavor.0: What does it really mean to be a Starlight Knight? Never backing down and standing up for the weak? Sacrifice, justice, compassion, honor?
flavor.2: "And don't compromise on what's not cool!"
flavor.3: "That's why I'll never abandon my companions!"

4.name: Flames of Justice
4.desc: While in combat, each use of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Drive Suppression</ct> increases Starlight - Billy's CRIT DMG by 8%, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 45s. Repeated triggers reset the duration. If HP is below 35% and Starlight - Billy is not the active character, he continuously recovers HP, up to 35%.

flavor.0: Ideals are born to uphold justice, yet they're destined to be abandoned.
flavor.1: "You're saying those shows are just for kids...?"
flavor.2: "The most courageous dreams are the ones only kids dare to believe in, right?"
flavor.3: "Then I, Starlight - Billy, will protect those ridiculed dreams!"

5.name: Radiant Armaments
5.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

flavor.0: You need a dazzling outfit to look like a real hero... it makes the whole thing pretty inconvenient.
flavor.1: "I'm not strong because of larger-caliber weapons or higher-power components!"
flavor.2: "My true weapon... is the endless starlight!"

6.name: Starlight Knight
6.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Starlight Knight Flying Kick</ct> and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Full-Throttle Starlight</ct>'s Sheer DMG increases by 18%. Landing the 4th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Knight's Technique</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Cool Wheelie</ct>, or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack: Knight's Swagger</ct> grants 1 stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Brilliant Starlight</ct>, stacking up to 6 times, and gaining at most 1 stack per skill use. When using <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Starlight Knight Flying Kick</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Full-Throttle Starlight</ct>, consumes up to 2 stacks of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Brilliant Starlight</ct>, with each stack consumed causing that skill's final hit to deal 100% Sheer Force as additional <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</ct>.

flavor.0: Those who always believe in hope will, in the end, become someone else's hope.
flavor.1: This is the story of the Starlight Knights, the story of Billy Kid.
